name: simplesat
description: Reads and writes Simplesat surveys, answers, questions, customers, and responses (including nested ticket data) through the Simplesat v1 API.

risk.read: reads survey/answer/customer/response data (including nested ticket/team-member sub-objects) from a connected Simplesat account
risk.write: creates/updates customers and team members, updates individual answers and survey responses, and can trigger a live survey-invitation email to a real customer inbox (send_survey_email)
risk.approval: none for customer/team-member/answer/response upserts (low-risk CRM-style data); send_survey_email sends a real outbound email and should be reviewed before enabling in a caller with untrusted input
